description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces [3->4] times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
Deals Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for [3->1]sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [(added) 1]sec, and reduces their Critical Chance by [100%->25%] for 7sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [2->0.5]sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by [(added) 20%] for [(added) 6]sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is. [Cleanse self on CC->(removed)]

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2->2000], but the number of hits is increased by [3->2].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy. [Ignore Block->(removed)]
For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150. [Mana cost increased by 1 and long knockback->(removed)]

description.unified: [Pew!] Increases DMG by [20%->{0}%], and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by [???->200].
[Twinkle Twinkle] The Crit Chance Reduction effect becomes irremovable, and increases the duration by {0} sec.
[Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec. [Increase knockback range->(removed)]

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [30%->10%], and damage taken is reduced by [30%->10%].

description.unified: Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.
